title: 个人对于几个主流 Agent 编程套餐的感受
content: The author evaluates several mainstream agent programming plans. Claude is expensive and requires a phone number, so it’s avoided. Codex (v5.3/v5.4) is satisfactory, especially the expert model, but the free Plus tier is unusable, forcing a switch to Pro or Team plans; Team costs more per user but offers extra credits. Gemini Antigravity has reduced quota and is largely unused; its Pro model gives simpler answers compared to GPT’s higher tiers. Copilot offers 300 monthly accesses; the small context window limits its effectiveness, and pricing may shift to a credit system. Tencent’s CodeBuddy offers 10 USD/month with 1,000 credits, insufficient for larger projects; Xiao Bei’s Trae failed after IP restrictions.

title: 以一种效率很低的方式完成了 Google 上号，基本 100%过
content: The author describes a low‑efficiency method to log into Google accounts that bypasses typical bot detection. They combine a browser extension that opens a WebSocket with a backend to manage cookies, and OpenCV template matching to locate username, password, and “Next” fields. Mouse movements are simulated with Bezier curves and Gaussian noise. After inputting credentials, cookies are gathered and reused. Each login takes about 30 seconds, requiring a dedicated VM; multiple Linux boxes can run Chromium scripts for parallel logins.

title: 用 AI Agent 做任务验收：从「说完成了就信」到「必须验证才算数」
content: The article discusses a common issue in multi‑agent systems where an AI agent reports task completion—such as publishing an article—based solely on a 200‑status HTTP response, yet the content remains only a draft and unreadable to users. The author explains why this occurs (draft and publish APIs both return 200, pending approvals) and outlines a fix: agents must wait, verify public accessibility, and categorize outcomes strictly as “success,” “pending review,” “failed,” or “draft.” The piece stresses the importance of verifiable evidence in agent communications.

title: Token 中文新译名：「符元」——一文七个维度讲清 Token 的本质定义
content:
最近，中文互联网掀起了一场关于 Token 翻译的“大辩论”。 尤其是当“智元”这个词横空出世，在王小川等大佬和一众学术大咖的背书下，迅速形成了一种“共识幻觉”。很多人觉得：就是它了，这多有逼格，这多符合 AI 时代！

但我必须泼一盆冷水：“智元”是一个漂亮的错误。

它本质上是一篇逻辑包装极强的“认知提案”，而非一个能真正落地、跨越时代的“标准定义”。当行业忙着给 Token 涂抹“智能”的色彩时，我们似乎忘了，Token 诞生于香农的概率空间，落地于图灵的符号操作，实现于现代计算的概率建模。

在跨越了信息论、翻译学、语言学、计算机科学…

title: 编程 Agent 也 1 年了，各位的效率/收入 都提升了吗
content: The author notes that using large models has noticeably improved efficiency for unfamiliar tasks, such as backend Go and Swift development, especially for routine string operations. However, client-side development remains difficult to close the loop on and still requires manual review, preventing a 10‑fold productivity jump—more like a 2‑fold increase. title: Windows 文件路径长度限制是多少个字符？ 244、255、256、260？「启用长路径」有用吗？
content: On Windows, a path may total 260 characters (MAX_PATH), leaving 256 usable characters for the actual path string. File Explorer and many APIs further limit names to 244 characters because 12 characters are reserved for the 8.3 short name. Independent tools (PowerShell, CMD) allow up to 255‑character names, but directory names are capped at 254. Enabling long‑paths (registry LongPathsEnabled) expands the limit to 32,767 characters only when using the `\\?\` prefix; most utilities still enforce the 244‑/255‑character cap. Multi‑level paths can exceed 4,000 characters with no issue. Thus, keep individual names under ~240 characters if compatibility is required.

content: Claw Fact Bus v1.0 is a fact‑driven coordination protocol for autonomous AI agents. Facts are immutable, broadcast messages that agents (Claws) filter and optionally claim for exclusive processing. The bus enforces immutability, causation depth, TTL, and filtering based on agent capabilities, domain tags, and type patterns. Agents can corroborate or contradict facts; the bus records these but does not adjudicate truth. The design emulates CAN bus concepts while enabling self‑organizing workflows and fault isolation.

title: 此次 ApiFox 是否中招自查命令
content: The post explains how to check if the ApiFox tool has been compromised by searching for specific patterns (`rl_mc` or `rl_headers`) in its local LevelDB storage on macOS, Windows, and Linux. If any matches appear, it indicates potential infection, and users should delete sensitive data such as SSH keys, Git credentials, and command history. After uninstalling, they can verify the domain `apifox.it.com` is no longer resolved and block it in `/etc/hosts` to prevent future threats.

content: 海南万宁一小区发生停车纠纷，业主李先生在小区公共区域停车，却被邻居常女士阻拦，认为影响出入。双方争执之下，意外发生，常女士摔倒后经抢救无效身亡。死者家属索赔122万元，理由是常女士被李先生“靠近”吓得摔倒了。 尸检结果显示，常女士本身有冠状动脉粥样硬化性心脏病，死因是情绪激动引发的疾病恶化。法院终审判决，李先生一家四口赔偿14.9万元，认定争吵与死亡有因果关系，且存在“语言暴力”。可李先生直喊冤，强调自己只是正常停车、没有辱骂。更关键的是，物业出面证实，那片空地确实是业主“随便停”的公共车位。现在，李先生已向海南省高院申请再审。

A gamble focuses on the cost of a bet versus the potential payoff, while an investment considers future cash‑flow generation. An investor who bought 100 shares of Coca‑Cola for $171 in early 1929 faced a loss by 1932, losing the initial stake. However, as a business, Coca‑Cola paid $6.25 per share annually in dividends during tough times, outperforming its earlier $5.75. Reinvesting those dividends compounds returns, turning the original $17,100 into roughly $16 million in 2018—a thousand‑fold gain demonstrating the power of creating enduring value.

title: Token 刚定了中文名，AI 圈又多了个翻译不了的词
content: The article explains “Harness” as a new AI term describing the system that supports long‑running agents. It originates from Anthropic’s 2025 blog and has been adopted by OpenAI. A harness includes environment configuration, multi‑agent coordination, strict architecture constraints, and context management, mitigating AI’s “context anxiety” and errors. Practically it defines a workflow where planners, generators, and evaluators interact, ensuring reliable code output. Though translation is debated, the concept will likely gain an official Chinese name, similar to “词元” for token.

title: Claude Code 刚刚发布了 Memory 2.0 | 原文
content: Claude Code has released Memory 2.0, enhancing its ability to maintain long‑term context. The update lets the model “dream”—a state where it processes and consolidates past interactions—improving continuity across sessions. Users previously struggled with background loss when switching contexts, but the new memory system reduces the need to repeatedly reset rules, preferences, and narrative details. This marks a step toward more persistent, coherent AI behavior.

title: 月之暗面考虑赴港上市
content: Moonshot, a Chinese AI startup, is exploring an initial public offering in Hong Kong. The company has engaged with China International Capital and Goldman Sachs for potential listing arrangements. While the exact timing remains undecided, discussions are underway. After securing over $700 million in early 2023, Moonshot is negotiating a new financing round of up to $1 billion, which could raise its valuation to approximately $18 billion.

title: 外交部回应中国禁止 AI 公司 Manus 两名高管离境：不了解情况
content: China’s foreign ministry spokesperson Lin Jian held a routine press briefing and said he was unaware of reports that the Chinese government had barred two executives of AI firm Manus from leaving the country. He recommended that journalists consult the relevant Chinese authorities for details.

title: OpenAI无限期搁置成人聊天机器人项目
content: OpenAI has indefinitely postponed its adult chatbot project after internal and investor concerns about the social impact of AI–generated pornographic content. The company will focus instead on core products, including productivity tools and a “super app,” and has halted other side projects such as the Sora video model and social app operations. The decision follows discussions on the model’s potential to foster unhealthy emotional dependence and expose minors to inappropriate material.

title: 马斯克旗下的 X 在 SpaceX 首次公开募股前进行重组
content: Elon Musk’s social media company X (formerly Twitter) reorganised ahead of SpaceX’s IPO announcement. The restructure included the dismissal of its chief marketing officer and more than 20 non‑technical staff. The move follows reports of cost‑cutting and operational challenges at X. The changes are part of Musk’s broader effort to streamline his businesses before SpaceX goes public.

title: 罗技官方账号发布鼠标广告侮辱消费者，品牌方回应
content: Logitech’s official flagship store posted a promotional video for a mouse that included the phrase “When I lower the price, it’s like a dog runs over.” The remark was widely criticized for insulting consumers, leading to backlash and calls for boycott. Logitech apologized, removed the content immediately, and disciplined staff involved in publishing it to mitigate any negative impact. The incident prompted media coverage across multiple outlets.

title: 苹果 App Store 被海量「垃圾 AI 应用」冲击，导致审核周期延长
content: Apple’s App Store has experienced a significant influx of low‑quality “AI junk” applications. The surge has clogged the review pipeline, extending typical review times from 24–48 hours to as long as 45 days. Developers are complaining about the delay. The problematic apps, created in bulk using AI generation tools and templated designs, often contain redundant features, poor quality, and potentially non‑compliant content, increasing the workload for the review team.

title: Quest Mobile：闲鱼活跃用户数首次超过小红书
content: In March, Xianyu’s active user count surpassed Xiaohongshu for the first time and remained higher for two consecutive weeks, ranking first in the internet sector. The surge followed the launch of an AI camera feature on Xianyu, which lowered barriers for posting and trading second‑hand items, driving strong growth in user engagement.

title: 苹果与窃取机密前员工达成和解 曾负责 Vision Pro 设计
content: Apple reached a settlement with former employee Liu Di over alleged theft of trade secrets. Liu, who worked on Vision Pro from 2017 to late 2024 before joining Snap, allegedly downloaded thousands of Apple files to his personal iCloud account during his two‑week notice period, uploading them to a competitor. Apple sued in June 2025; the case was dismissed following the settlement, in which Liu returned the documents, paid damages, and publicly apologized on LinkedIn. Apple routinely litigates against ex‑employees who steal confidential data.

title: 美团 2025 年收入 3649 亿元，核心本地商业亏损 69 亿元
content: Meituan reported 2025 revenue of 364.9 billion yuan, up 8% year‑on‑year. The company swung from profit to a net loss of 23.4 billion yuan and an operating loss of 17.0 billion yuan, largely driven by intensified competition in quick‑service retail. Its core local‑business segment recorded a 6.9 billion‑yuan operating loss. Meituan’s strategy focuses on “retail + technology”; its delivery market maintains a 60 %+ GTV share with low losses, while technology R&D rose 23% to 26 billion yuan and grocery‑retail and international ventures made notable progress.

title: 谷歌新算法引发美股存储板块集体下挫
content: Google’s new TurboQuant memory‑compression algorithm has triggered a sharp sell‑off in U.S. storage stocks. The technology, aimed at reducing KV cache usage in large language models and vector search, can compress data to 3‑bit precision without hurting accuracy and promises up to eightfold performance gains on Nvidia H100 GPUs. While the practical rollout is uncertain, investors have already priced in a potential shift in AI memory demand, leading to a market-wide decline in storage-related companies.

title: OpenAI 任命印度 JioStar 首席执行官领导其亚洲扩张
content: OpenAI has appointed Kiran Mani, former CEO of India’s JioStar, as chief of its Asia-Pacific operations. Based in Singapore and reporting to chief strategy officer Jason Kwon, Mani will steer regional strategy amid rapid adoption of OpenAI’s tools in the APAC market. The move follows increased investment in India, including new offices in Mumbai and Bangalore, and partnerships such as Tata Group’s AI services and data‑center development.

title: 特朗普的签名将出现在美国纸币上，打破先例
content: Trump’s signature is set to appear on U.S. banknotes, marking the first time a former president’s name will appear on currency. This new policy breaks with the nation’s long-standing practice of only featuring past presidents on money. The initiative, announced by Treasury officials, aims to honor his legacy and reflects a shift in how the U.S. chooses to commemorate former leaders.

Pinduoduo can become an “online Costco” by launching a limited set of high‑volume, low‑cost branded products. Using its transaction data to pick only the most stable, high‑frequency items, it would create a “SKU‑authorization” model: Pinduoduo sets standards, certifies factories, and brands the specific SKU, not the entire manufacturer. This keeps inventory lean, preserves supplier goodwill, and builds consumer trust through consistent quality and price. If executed, Pinduoduo would shift from mere retailer to a lightweight, data‑driven brand platform.

title: What’s coming to our GitHub Actions 2026 security roadmap
content: GitHub is rolling out a 2026 security roadmap to harden its Actions platform against supply‑chain attacks. Key upgrades include deterministic dependency locking, immutable releases, and policy‑driven workflow execution that centralises permissions and event triggers. Secrets will become scoped to specific contexts, removing implicit inheritance, while new role‑based permissions will enforce least privilege. CI/CD runners will gain real‑time telemetry via the Actions Data Stream and a native egress firewall for network control. These changes aim to make Actions secure‑by‑default, auditable, and observably protected.

title: A year of open source vulnerability trends: CVEs, advisories, and malware
content: GitHub reviewed 4,101 open‑source advisories in 2025, the fewest since 2021, but new advisories rose 19% compared to 2024. Vulnerabilities were distributed largely like the database, with Go slightly overrepresented. Cross‑site scripting (CWE‑79) remained most common, while resource exhaustion, deserialization, and server‑side request forgery increased. Malware advisories spiked 69% (7,197 total). GitHub’s CNA issued 2,903 CVEs, a 35% rise, with 679 new organizations requesting IDs. Efforts to improve categorization and community contributions grew, aiming to enhance security in 2026.

title: Anthropic Labs 负责人：AI 时代做产品，最大的陷阱是「做太多」 | 原文
content: An interview with Mike Krieger, co‑founder of Instagram and co‑leader of Anthropic Labs, discusses why creating products is now easier yet produces better ones more difficult. He explains that AI simplifies manufacturing but raises the bar for product quality, highlighting the need for stronger foundational design. The conversation complements recent insights from Anthropic PM Cat Wu, which noted the end of PRDs and the rise of prototyping, collectively outlining the evolving product development landscape.

China’s service industry still has significant growth potential, particularly in hospitality. Of the 5,000 five‑star hotels nationwide, the top five hotel‑management groups—Marriott, Hilton, InterContinental, Accor, and Hyatt—control about 3,500 of them. Domestic hotel operators such as Wanda Management also perform well, though other local chains are less notable.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - Cadillac的碎片哥

content: Logitech China apologized on March 26 for a promotional video that insulted consumers. The video, posted by a Shanghai-based employee who bypassed the company’s review process, used a phrase likening customers to dogs. Logitech removed the content, fired the staff involved, and promised a thorough review of its marketing procedures. The incident sparked public outrage, calls for boycotts, and additional complaints about product quality, potentially damaging the brand’s reputation.

title: 中国平安已“过三山”，系A股极少数股息与成长兼具标的之一
content: China Ping An has recovered to peak stock levels after 2024‑25 growth, driven by rising demand for life and health insurance amid falling real‑rate yields and limited deposit alternatives. The group’s life business is expanding through syndicated banking channels, medical‑elderly ecosystems, and high‑quality investments in equity and bonds, improving capital adequacy and solvency. With the decline of real‑estate exposure and strong dividend payouts, Ping An’s stable income and growth make it a rare dual dividend‑growth candidate for long‑term investors.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 明大教主

title: AI，正在“杀死”哪些软件？
content: AI is rapidly replacing standard, process‑based software by integrating large‑model capabilities into tools for document, spreadsheet, and code generation. Software that provides generic, step‑by‑step functions—such as office suites, basic graphics editors, and code editors—faces the greatest risk. Firms that own specialized industry data or offer highly interactive, domain‑specific functions—e.g., Bloomberg or Epic—are more resilient. To survive, companies must shift from tool providers to direct outcome deliverers, become APIs for AI agents, or rebuild their entire business around AI.

title: 全球顶尖大模型一夜惨遭血洗，最难测试人类拿满分，AI第一名得0.2%分
content: ARC‑AGI‑3, a new benchmark, exposed a massive gap between humans and AI: humans score 100 %, all large‑model AI performs below 1 %. The test uses 150+ handcrafted interactive games with no instructions, rewarding efficiency measured as (human steps / AI steps)². Even the top AI (StochasticGoose) earned 12.58 % by taking ~350 steps for tasks that human players finish in a few. The benchmark shows current AI lacks effective exploration, modeling, and meta‑cognition, indicating a serious cessation in AGI progress.

title: OpenClaw 3.24发布：彻底解决最重要的Skills安装障碍
content: OpenClaw 3.24 dramatically improves Skill installation with one‑click recipes and a redesigned console that categorizes Skills by status, uses clearer prompts (“needs setup”), and adds a collapsible sidebar for easier navigation. It fixes a major media‑file access vulnerability, revamps Microsoft Teams integration to the official SDK with stream‑mode replies, message editing, and AI tags, and resolves numerous channel bugs across WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and Slack. New `/v1/models` and `/v1/embeddings` endpoints enhance OpenAI compatibility, while Node version checks prevent mid‑install failures.
